description: A texture artist needs to prepare the Suzanne mesh for texturing. UV unwrap the mesh and apply a material using a Checker Texture node with a scale between 5 and 30 connected to the Base Color. Save the rendered image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/checker_render.png and the Blender project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/suzanne_checker.blend. The scene already contains Suzanne, a ground plane, camera, and sun light.
